item.name: Shoshitsuki
item.description:
The fleetness of these sharks is enough to tire even a god, but where divinity sees a menace, a fisher sees opportunity.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The speed of these enormous sharks has seen them named for the demons that fleet-footed Idaten pursued across the firmament. A single fearsome pod can hold dominion over a territory stretching from the Ruby Sea to Kugane.
